column_description: City-assigned neighbourhood identifier (PK)
Neighbourhood display name
PostGIS polygon boundary in WGS84 (EPSG:4326)
Neighbourhood identifier (FK)
Year of crime data (2016-2025)
Total reported crime incidents in the year
Crime incidents per 100k population
Year-over-year % change in crime rate
Number of assault incidents
Number of auto theft incidents
Number of break-and-enter incidents
Number of robbery incidents
Number of theft over $5000 incidents
Number of homicide incidents
Safety percentile score (0-100; higher = safer) inverted from crime rate ranking
calculation_formula: ROUND((1 - PERCENT_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY year ORDER BY crime_rate_per_100k)) * 100, 1)

column_description: Neighbourhood identifier (FK)
Analysis year (2014-2025)
Neighbourhood population — most recent census year <= analysis year
Median household income — neighbourhood-level where available then CMA fallback
Safety score (0-100; higher = safer) inverted percentile of crime rate within year
calculation_formula: ROUND(100 - PERCENT_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY year ORDER BY crime_rate_per_100k) * 100, 1)

column_description: Housing affordability index score (100 = city average for that year)
Amenity score relative to city average (100 = city avg) — based on amenities per 1000 residents
Composite livability score (0-100) — weighted composite of safety + affordability + amenities
Crime incidents per 100k population (raw metric)
Annual 2-bed rent as % of CMA median household income
Average 2-bedroom rent at CMA level (standard unit)
CMA-level rental vacancy rate
Total amenities (parks + schools + libraries + childcare + community centres) per 1000 residents
Neighbourhood identifier (FK)
Rental data year
Most recent census year used for this row (2016 or 2021)
% of occupied dwellings that are owner-occupied
% of occupied dwellings that are renter-occupied
Average bachelor unit rent (area-weighted from CMHC zones)
Average 1-bedroom rent (area-weighted from CMHC zones)
Average 2-bedroom rent (area-weighted from CMHC zones)
Average 3-bedroom rent (area-weighted from CMHC zones)
Absolute year-over-year rent change for bachelor units (from CMHC source)
Absolute year-over-year rent change for 1-bed units
Absolute year-over-year rent change for 2-bed units
Absolute year-over-year rent change for 3-bed units
% year-over-year rent change for bachelor units (neighbourhood-level calculation)
calculation_formula: ROUND((avg_rent - LAG(avg_rent) OVER (PARTITION BY neighbourhood_id ORDER BY year)) / LAG(avg_rent) * 100, 2)

column_description: % year-over-year rent change for 1-bed units
calculation_formula: ROUND((avg_rent - LAG(avg_rent) OVER (PARTITION BY neighbourhood_id ORDER BY year)) / LAG(avg_rent) * 100, 2)

column_description: % year-over-year rent change for 2-bed units
calculation_formula: ROUND((avg_rent - LAG(avg_rent) OVER (PARTITION BY neighbourhood_id ORDER BY year)) / LAG(avg_rent) * 100, 2)

column_description: % year-over-year rent change for 3-bed units
calculation_formula: ROUND((avg_rent - LAG(avg_rent) OVER (PARTITION BY neighbourhood_id ORDER BY year)) / LAG(avg_rent) * 100, 2)

column_description: Rental vacancy rate for bachelor units (area-weighted from CMHC zones)
Rental vacancy rate for 1-bed units
Rental vacancy rate for 2-bed units
Rental vacancy rate for 3-bed units
Rental unit turnover rate for bachelor units (area-weighted)
Rental unit turnover rate for 1-bed units
Rental unit turnover rate for 2-bed units
Rental unit turnover rate for 3-bed units
Estimated total rental units for bachelor type (sum of weighted estimates)
Estimated total rental units for 1-bed type
Estimated total rental units for 2-bed type
Estimated total rental units for 3-bed type
Total estimated rental units across all bedroom types
Annual 2-bed rent as % of neighbourhood median income (affordability burden)
True if annual 2-bed rent <= 30% of median household income
Affordability index (100 = city average for year) — higher = more expensive relative to city
Affordability pressure score (0-100) — weighted composite of rent burden + renter share + low vacancy
calculation_formula: ROUND(LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, COALESCE(rent2income_pct, 0)*0.5 + COALESCE(pct_renter_occupied, 0)*0.3 + GREATEST(0, 10 - COALESCE(vacancy_rate_2bed*100, 10))*2)), 1)

column_description: Turnover rate scalar — 2-bed as primary proxy for callers needing single value
Composite livability score (0-100) — safety 30% + affordability 40% + amenity 30%
